name: jarvis-project
description: J.A.R.V.I.S — Native Windows desktop AI assistant (Tauri v2 + Python sidecar)

scripts.dev: npm run sync-env && npx -y concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c cyan,magenta "npm run backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.backend: npm run sync-env && cd backend && .venv\Scripts\python.exe main.py
scripts.build: npm run sync-env && npm run build --prefix frontend
